creator: fgudin+fbsd@bsdbellule.fr
text:
Discussed with and confirmed by David Durieux (*d.durieux* |siprossii| |dot com|), core GLPI developper and original ports submitter:
both ports are long deprecated, and nowadays can't even work within an up to date GLPI setup. Those should be removed from the ports tree as they can mislead potential GLPI / FusionInventory (which now carries those ports' functions and more) new users.
Thanks in advance.

Best regards,
-- 
Francis GUDIN
